arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold endures AWKWARD return to Liverpool training as he nears Real Madrid move
arts.sum: With the international break done and dusted, the Reds return to Premier League action on Wednesday with a crucial Merseyside derby against bitter rivals Everton.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Copa del Rey match against Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Tuesday’s match against Real Sociedad in the return leg of the Copa del Rey Semifinals. HOW TO WATCH, STREAM COPA DEL REY

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti hints at increased role for Real Madrid youngster vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has hinted at a potentially prominent role for youngster Endrick in his side’s next outing. Real are of course primed to return to action…

arts.ttl: Xabi Prieto on playing at the Bernabeu: “It’s not easy to have good memories of such a difficult stadium,”
arts.sum: As Real Sociedad prepares to face Real Madrid in the decisive second leg of the Copa del Rey semi-final, their club legend Xabi Prieto has shared his thoughts on his experiences playing at the iconic Santiago Bernabéu. “It’s not easy to have good memories of such a difficult stadium,” Prieto admitted.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name squad to face Real Sociedad
arts.sum: The squad of players called upon by the Real Madrid coaching staff for the club’s upcoming meeting with Real Sociedad has on Monday been unveiled. Real Madrid are of course…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé confirms regular contact with Real Madrid legend Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has revealed that he maintains regular contact with club icon Cristiano Ronaldo. The names of attacking pair Mbappé and Ronaldo of course took their place…

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso's final Real Madrid decision revealed by Bayer Leverkusen chief
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are confident that Xabi Alonso won't be leaving the club this summer amid ongoing links with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “If you want to be at Real Madrid it’s customary to put up with being on the bench”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media ahead of Tuesday night’s Copa del Rey semi-final second leg against Real Sociedad and answered many questions, including some on Endrick, of whom he said, “I keep him in mind. I think the history of this club says that many first-team players have had to be on the bench for a long time.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to sell Vinicius Jr after €300m bid as Cristiano Ronaldo contract on the table
arts.sum: Real Madrid are willing to let Vinicius Junior leave the club this summer should a €300 million bid be placed on the table, according to a report from Spain. Real Madrid to sell Vinicius Jr after €300m bid as Cristiano Ronaldo contract on the table

arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois injury recovery extended as Real Madrid star misses training
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois looks as if he will miss a third straight game through injury, after returning from international duty with Belgium with a muscle problem. Courtois returned to action for Belgium for the first time in two years against Ukraine in Murcia, but after missing the second game through a muscle issue […] The post Thibaut Courtois injury recovery extended as Real Madrid star misses training appeared first on Football España.
